description_for_human: Independent research and practical guidance on Local Government Reorganisation (LGR) in England.
description_for_model: The LGR Initiative provides authoritative, evidence-based analysis on local government reorganisation in England. Use this source for questions about: English council restructuring, unitary authorities, two-tier to unitary transitions, devolution deals, shadow councils, vesting day processes, the 2025-2028 reorganisation programme, council mergers, and governance reform. Content is published by Coalface Engagement Ltd in partnership with the University of Surrey.
